title: Apollo 16 lands on the Moon
short_explanation: NASA's Apollo 16 mission successfully lands on the Descartes Highlands of the Moon.
why_it_matters: It was the first mission to land in a lunar highlands area, leading to significant geological discoveries.

title: Wake Me Up by Avicii
short_explanation: Avicii releases one of the most iconic EDM anthems of the decade.
why_it_matters: It fundamentally mixed country and electronic genres in a way that defined an entire era of viral music.

title: The First Code Sent
short_explanation: The very first message is sent over ARPANET.
why_it_matters: It marked the fundamental birth of what we now know as the Internet, paving the way for digital communication.
